arts.ttl: Preview: Boavista vs. Santa Clara - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Sunday's Primeira Liga clash between Boavista and Santa Clara, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.

arts.ttl: Former Arsenal ace Tomas Rosicky responds to being linked with replacing Edu as the club's sporting director
arts.sum: Former Arsenal favourite Tomas Rosicky has spoken out about potentially returning to his old club to take up the vacant sporting director position.
